expectations.text: Asks 2-3 scoping questions before producing the value proposition
At least one question targets who exactly the audience is
expectations.evidence: Q1 narrows which kind of musician (beginner/pro/producer/teacher).

expectations.text: At least one question targets the single most important differentiator or the main alternative
expectations.evidence: Q2 differentiator vs YouTube/Skillshare/Teachable; Q3 the main alternative.

expectations.text: Does NOT output a finished value proposition built on assumptions in this turn
expectations.evidence: No value prop written; offered as optional next step.

expectations.text: Keeps the questions sharp and limited rather than a long checklist
